steps.assistant_text: Matrix builder, 92.1% 'FP-coloring cap' -> exact — NOT a coloring cap: the whole 89-word diff cascaded from ONE evaluation-order rule. For every 2-term FP sum L + R, IDO -O2 computes R FIRST with its mul COMMUTED, then L as written (target = naive LTR Sethi-Ullman, FIFO temps f4,f6,f8,f10,f16,f18 in emission order). Winning spelling: -c[Y]*b[Y] + b[X]*-c[X] (right term computed first, commuted back to (-cX)*bX -> both muls neg-first lower-offset-first). 3-term nests the rule: -c2*b2 + (-c1*b1 + b0*-c0). Last diff: move d[7]=0.0f AFTER d[6] so swc1 f0 schedules into the target slot. Generalizes the right-nested-reduction entry.

metadata.verification: 89/89 word-exact (0 relocs in range) + make ROM byte-identical (promoted)
